name: Bench Press
description: A classic compound exercise for chest development.
instructions: Grip the barbell with hands slightly wider than shoulder-width.
Lower the bar to your mid-chest.
Press the bar back up to the starting position.

name: Bicep Curl
description: An isolation exercise for the biceps.
instructions: Hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Keep your elbows close to your torso.
Curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
